column1: # Tutorial Chapter 1, Lesson 4: numeric VALUE entry, range erase,
# vertical pointer-key commit, the repeating-label prefix, typed range
# input, single-cell-to-range copy, and named ranges as /Copy input.
# Enter quarterly Net Sales values in B5..E5 using RIGHT as commit.
# Seed C8..D12 with temporary Costs and Expenses data.
# Erase C8..D12 by typing the range address at the POINT prompt, as
# Create the separator line in A4 with the repeating label prefix.
# Copy A4's repeating dash cell to the wider B4..F4 destination range.
# Name the full separator line and use the name as the /Copy FROM
# range, matching the later Lesson 4 workflow. The second copy uses
# F3 NAMES selection from the FROM prompt.
